items.raw_excerpt: Nearly all the Thai labourers are working for a single firm, which pays their travel fees and has not been linked to human trafficking and exploitation, unlike others in the field.
items.summary_en: Finland granted work permits to only 123 Thai berry pickers this year, despite thousands applying. Nearly all of them work for one company that pays their travel costs and has not been linked to human trafficking.
items.summary_ko: 핀란드는 올해 수천 명이 지원했지만 태국 딸기 수확 작업자 123명에게만 취업 허가를 내줬다. 거의 모두가 여행 경비를 지불하는 한 회사 소속이며, 인신매매 연루 의혹은 없는 것으로 확인됐다.
items.title_en: Thousands applied, but only 123 berry harvesters from Thailand granted permits this year
items.title_ko: 수천 명이 지원했지만 올해 태국 딸기 수확 작업 허가를 받은 사람은 123명뿐
items.title_original: Thousands applied, but only 123 berry harvesters from Thailand granted permits this year

items.raw_excerpt: Ανώτερες Σπουδές σε κορυφαίες ειδικότητες με τις πιο σύγχρονες προδιαγραφές σε Αθήνα, Πειραιά, Γλυφάδα & Θεσσαλονίκη
items.summary_en: SAEC ALFA offers higher education programs in top specialties with modern specifications. Campuses are located in Athens, Piraeus, Glyfada, and Thessaloniki, Greece. The institution promotes its programs for prospective students seeking to advance their education.
items.summary_ko: SAEC ALFA는 아테네, 피레아스, 글리파다, 테살로니키에 캠퍼스를 두고 최신 사양의 주요 전공 고등교육 프로그램을 제공합니다. 학업을 한 단계 더 발전시키고자 하는 학생들을 위한 홍보 콘텐츠입니다.
items.title_en: Take the Next Step at SAEC ALFA Higher Education
items.title_ko: SAEC ALFA 고등교육에서 한 단계 더 나아가세요
items.title_original: Κάνε το επόμενο βήμα στις ΣΑΕΚ ΑΛΦΑ
